form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 6 m finishing third after a quick start, behind In Lexys Words at Bathurst over 2260m in a NR up to 52 on April 1 at $1.95. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Foresight at Parkes over 1660m in a NR up to 52 on April 4 at $8. Racing well and should be in the finish again.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr3) over 1660m at Parkes beaten 14 m by Memphis Fury (2:02.20) in NR up to 52 on April 4 at $6.50. At the run before 7th (Sr2) over 1720m at Young, beaten 25 m by Shes Got A Reason (2:02.70) in NR up to 52 on March 24 at $7.50. May challenge from a decent gate.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Sr1) over 1660m at Parkes beaten 40 m by Foresight (1:59.30) in NR up to 52 on April 4 at $12. Before that, a solid effort when 2nd (Fr3) over 1730m at Bathurst beaten 35 m by Go Easy On Me (2:04.40) in NR up to 55 M on March 27 at $34. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Last start a big 7 m win as favourite (Sr1) at Parkes (2:33.20) beating Yesnoletsgo in 2 WINs on April 4 at $2. In form now and can go on with it.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: When entering the home straight inconvenienced when hanging in under pressure.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked leaving the 1400m when Kimcando broke gait.
Out of position at the start. Tired over the concluding stages of the event.

form.formComment: Last start by 5.5 m after showing early speed, (Fr2) at Parkes (1:59.30) beating Beancounter in NR up to 52 on April 4 at $4.60. Sure to go well again.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 3rd (Fr1) over 1760m after showing early speed at Junee, at the bell was leading 1.2 beaten 11 m by Potter (2:10.20) in NR up to 53 on March 31 at $8. Has the ability to take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out under pressure allowing a run for Mop to the inside of the gelding.
Over raced throughout the event whilst leading.
Approaching the 1500m checked as a result of Itz Bad breaking gait.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr5) over 1730m after racing wide at Bathurst was 9th-18.63 at the bell, beaten 13 m by She The Devil (2:02.60) in NR up to 57 on April 1 at $15. At the start before 7th (Sr1) over 1730m at Bathurst beaten 13 m by Allstarzzz Frankie (2:03.90) in 4yo+ NR up to 80 GH on March 25 at $16. Rates highly on best form and can bounce back.
